figures.caption: Figure 1: Architecture overview. Working memory resides within the executive—it is the LLM’s active workspace, not part of the memory store. Identity emerges from high-weight gists that the gateway selects frequently into working memory. The memory service exposes two access levels: gists/valence vectors (cheap O(1) lookup used by System 1 via the gateway) and the full graph (expensive traversal used by System 2 directly). System 2 bypasses gateway thresholds for deliberate search, analogous to direct PFC–hippocampal circuits. A compression mechanism (implementationdependent) degrades content resolution over time while preserving valence vectors.
